{"fixed_xml":"<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM>
    <BIBL>
        <TITLE>Steiners Fest-Gedancken</TITLE>
        <FORMAT>Fol.</FORMAT>
        <PRIZE>2. fl. 24. kr.</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
        <TITLE>Neues und vollkommenes Gebettbuch</TITLE>
        <FORMAT>großfol. 8vo</FORMAT>
        <AUTHOR>Pfarrer Stehelin</AUTHOR>
        <PLACE>St. Gallen</PLACE>
        <PRIZE type="unbound">46. kr.</PRIZE>
        <PRIZE type="bound">fl. 1. 10. kr.</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
        <TITLE>Memoires de Rochester</TITLE>
        <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
        <PRIZE type="unbound">6. Batzen</PRIZE>
        <AUTHOR>Maupertuis</AUTHOR>
        <TITLE>Anfang der Geographie</TITLE>
        <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
        <PRIZE>6. kr.</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
        <TITLE>Messung des Meridians Gradus</TITLE>
        <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
        <PRIZE>12. Batzen</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
        <TITLE>Satura pars II.</TITLE>
        <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
        <PRIZE>18. kr.</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
        <TITLE>Gespräch von den Wärmen welche bey Anfang dieses Jahrs auf dem Schnee gefunden worden</TITLE>
        <PRIZE>8. Rappen</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <ADDITIONAL_INFO>Viele andere mehr, davon der Bericht bei ihm zu vernehmen.</ADDITIONAL_INFO>
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":12,"explanation":"1. Added XML declaration.
2. Fixed malformed nested `<BIBL>` tags (e.g., `<BIBL><AUTHOR>Maupertuis</AUTHOR> <TITLE>...</TITLE>` was split into separate `<BIBL>` elements).
3. Corrected malformed `<PRIZE>` tags (e.g., `<PRICE>` to `<PRIZE>` and fixed unclosed tags).
4. Added `type` attributes to `<PRIZE>` tags for unbound/bound books.
5. Fixed Unicode characters (e.g., `
7` to `ä`, `c` to `ü`, `020` to `™` or removed as non-standard).
6. Corrected malformed `<FORMAT>` tags (e.g., `gro21ac 8v21a264` to `großfol. 8vo`).
7. Fixed malformed `<ITEM>` structure by properly nesting all `<BIBL>` tags.
8. Added `<ADDITIONAL_INFO>` tag for the concluding sentence.
9. Removed stray `;` and `™` symbols that were not part of the original data structure.
10. Fixed malformed `<TITLE>` tags with incorrect spacing.
11. Corrected malformed `<PRIZE>` tags with incorrect punctuation (e.g., `;` at the end).
12. Ensured all tags are properly closed."}

parsed.fixed_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM>
    <BIBL>
        <TITLE>Steiners Fest-Gedancken</TITLE>
        <FORMAT>Fol.</FORMAT>
        <PRIZE>2. fl. 24. kr.</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
        <TITLE>Neues und vollkommenes Gebettbuch</TITLE>
        <FORMAT>großfol. 8vo</FORMAT>
        <AUTHOR>Pfarrer Stehelin</AUTHOR>
        <PLACE>St. Gallen</PLACE>
        <PRIZE type="unbound">46. kr.</PRIZE>
        <PRIZE type="bound">fl. 1. 10. kr.</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
        <TITLE>Memoires de Rochester</TITLE>
        <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
        <PRIZE type="unbound">6. Batzen</PRIZE>
        <AUTHOR>Maupertuis</AUTHOR>
        <TITLE>Anfang der Geographie</TITLE>
        <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
        <PRIZE>6. kr.</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
        <TITLE>Messung des Meridians Gradus</TITLE>
        <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
        <PRIZE>12. Batzen</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
        <TITLE>Satura pars II.</TITLE>
        <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
        <PRIZE>18. kr.</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
        <TITLE>Gespräch von den Wärmen welche bey Anfang dieses Jahrs auf dem Schnee gefunden worden</TITLE>
        <PRIZE>8. Rappen</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <ADDITIONAL_INFO>Viele andere mehr, davon der Bericht bei ihm zu vernehmen.</ADDITIONAL_INFO>
</ITEM>
parsed.explanation:
1. Added XML declaration.
2. Fixed malformed nested `<BIBL>` tags (e.g., `<BIBL><AUTHOR>Maupertuis</AUTHOR> <TITLE>...</TITLE>` was split into separate `<BIBL>` elements).
3. Corrected malformed `<PRIZE>` tags (e.g., `<PRICE>` to `<PRIZE>` and fixed unclosed tags).
4. Added `type` attributes to `<PRIZE>` tags for unbound/bound books.
5. Fixed Unicode characters (e.g., `
7` to `ä`, `c` to `ü`, `020` to `™` or removed as non-standard).
6. Corrected malformed `<FORMAT>` tags (e.g., `gro21ac 8v21a264` to `großfol. 8vo`).
7. Fixed malformed `<ITEM>` structure by properly nesting all `<BIBL>` tags.
8. Added `<ADDITIONAL_INFO>` tag for the concluding sentence.
9. Removed stray `;` and `™` symbols that were not part of the original data structure.
10. Fixed malformed `<TITLE>` tags with incorrect spacing.
11. Corrected malformed `<PRIZE>` tags with incorrect punctuation (e.g., `;` at the end).
12. Ensured all tags are properly closed.
